title: kaempferia angustifolia
intro: Kaempferia angustifolia, also known as Thai Galangal or Khao Yai, is a type of plant belonging to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae) native to Thailand and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant's medicinal properties have been traditionally used to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and relieve pain, making it a popular ingredient in herbal medicine. The health benefits of Kaempferia angustifolia include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Kaempferia angustifolia can be prepared in various forms, including tea, capsules, and infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
